horizon_K: K rows forward in prices CSV per (day, timestamp, symbol); see phase scripts
sonic_joint_gate: VEV_5200 and VEV_5300 top-of-book spread both <= 2 (aligned timestamps); see analyze_r4_phase3_sonic_gate.py

stacked_story.actionable_hook: Mark 67 aggressive buy extract (tight) -> positive fwd mids; Mark 38 buy -> adverse; used in trader run() via market_trades

stacked_story.sim_link: Burst edge overlaps Sonic tight window (Phase 3); sim evolved from v0 hooks to gate + asymmetric extract quotes
Population extract fwd-mid much better when gate tight; MM uses gate for extract/hydro/5200-5300 quoting; asymmetric tight ask from v9-v12 grid

stacked_story.mechanism: v12 day-conditioned tight ask +1 ask half when Mark67 aggressive buy and gate tight (marginal; day3 base ask +2 can bump to +3)
